# Security Policy

## Supported versions

| Version | Supported |
|---------|-----------|
| 0.1.x   | Yes       |

## Reporting a vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability, please **do not open a public issue**. Instead:

1. Email the maintainers at **[INSERT EMAIL]** with details
2. Include steps to reproduce and potential impact
3. We will acknowledge receipt within 48 hours
4. We will provide an initial assessment within 7 days

We appreciate responsible disclosure and will credit reporters in the fix release notes (unless you prefer to remain anonymous).
